Notice Of Renewed Motion And Motion For Order Transferring Further Proceedings And Trial Of Action To Orange County
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Edward D. Haas, Esq. of ROECA HASS 352-0980, specially appearing for defendants Thomas P. Stabile and Schwamb & Stabile, moving for order transferring further proceedings and trial of action to Orange County
Stanley P. Fleshman, Esq. of DREYER, BABICH 916/920-2111, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT THOMAS STABILE, SCHWAMB & STABILE's Motion For Order Transferring Further Proceedings And Trial Of Action To Orange County -- denied. Venue was correct when action transferred to SF and is not affected by the subsequent dismissal of brokerage defendants. See 3 Witkin CA Proc.4th Sec. 806 Remington Sewing Machine Co. v. Cole 62 cal 311, 318. The clerk was ordered to enter the minute order and no actual is needed. (CB/301/JU) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
** In chambers, the Court amended its previous ruling and ordered the prevailing to prepare an order for the Court's signature.
